hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^git (commit|merge|push)'; then branch=$(git -C /home/user/Claude-Code rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); if [ "$branch" = "claude/kompagnon-automation-system-FapM9" ]; then git -C /home/user/Claude-Code push origin claude/kompagnon-automation-system-FapM9 2>&1 | tail -3; fi; fi
